programs.title: Burning Lies
programs.desc: (2021) Tense psychological thriller with Annika Foster. A woman falls for a handsome firefighter who saves her life, but soon discovers that his overprotective nature can get obsessive - and deadly.

programs.title: Island Of Shadows
programs.desc: (2020) Dark thriller with Anna Hopkins. While staying in a house that once belonged to her family, a true-crime author unravels a sinister truth lurking in the shadows. Family secrets can be deadly...

programs.title: A Teacher's Obsession
programs.desc: (2015) Obsessive drama with Mia Rose Frampton. A troubled high school student meets a teacher who offers to help her avoid probation, but her methods prove unethical, disturbing and ultimately deadly.

programs.title: Redemption Day
programs.desc: (2021) Action thriller with Gary Dourdan, Serinda Swan and Andy Garcia. A war hero embarks on a daring rescue mission when his wife is kidnapped. As the clock counts down, can he get to her in time?

programs.title: The Air I Breathe
programs.desc: (2007) Crime drama with Brendan Fraser. Visions, threats, desperate measures, and high-stakes gambles intertwine in this white-knuckle thriller that never stops for breath.

programs.title: The Hatton Garden Job
programs.desc: (2017) True crime story with Larry Lamb. A group of old-time criminals attempt to pull off the biggest heist in British history. Also starring Joely Richardson and Phil Daniels.
